source.title: What is the production capacity of a Claim Stake?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “What is the production capacity of a Claim Stake?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Claim Stakes enlisted in Faction Claims produce and store R4 resources Fuel, Food, Toolkits, and Ammunition. However, each stake has a maximum storage capacity based on its tier. Once this cap is reached, production pauses until you claim your rewards.
How Capacity Works
Each Claim Stake has afixed storage limit for each R4 type
Once full, production stops until you claim the accumulated resources
Capacity by Claim Stake Tier
Tier

🔁 Once a stake hits these caps, it stops producing. Make sure to claim your R4 regularly to avoid production downtime.
